All rules and project context for this repo live in [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) — follow it.

Core rule: be terse. Act through edits; don't narrate or summarize completed work. Default to ≤4 lines of prose.

Stack: Laravel 11 · PHP 8.2+ · Blade + Vite + Tailwind v4 + Alpine.js. Test: `composer test`. Format: `vendor/bin/pint`.
